title: PALONE Electric Fly Swatter, 4000V Foldable Fly Zapper Killer with Rechargeable Battery, 3 Layers Mesh with USB-C, Mosquito Killer Flying Insects Control for Living room, Garden, Kitchen
features: 4000V High-Voltage Power Grid: The voltage is far beyond that of ordinary fly zapper. This electric fly swatter releases a powerful current instantly, killing mosquitoes upon contact. There is no need for repeated swats.

2-in-1 Mosquito Control Mode: The electric fly zapper has both manual mode and automatic mode. In manual mode, you can actively strike mosquitoes. In automatic mode, it can attract mosquitoes and then eliminate them.

180° Rotatable Bug Zapper Head: After adjustment, it can be placed on the table directly without the need for manual tapping. Moreover, this electric fly zapper is equipped with a hanging rope, allowing it to be hung up for convenient access whenever needed, making it both handy and fast.

Three-Layer Safety Protection Net Design: The outer layer net prevents accidental contact, the middle layer net precisely eliminates mosquitoes, and the inner layer insulating net ensures safety. This electric fly swatter is efficient and reassuring.

USB Charging Battery: This fly killer is equipped with the rechargeable battery that can support long-term continuous operation after being fully charged. The USB charging function makes this bug zapper convenient to charge through an adapter or a power bank.

Suitable for Various Occasions: Because this electric fly swatter is easy to store, you can carry it with you when going out for meals or engaging in other outdoor activities. As a result, you can enjoy your vacation without being bitten by mosquitoes.
description: Product Description After being fully charged, how long can the battery last in the automatic mode? In the automatic mode, it can last for 2 hours, while in the manual mode, it can last up to 10 days. Can a 4000V power grid really kill mosquitoes in one go? Does it require multiple strikes? It can kill them instantly. Even if the mosquito is not killed immediately by the electric shock, it will be stuck between the nets and continue to be electrocuted, without the need for repeated strikes. Is the folding design convenient for outdoor carrying (such as during a picnic)? Yes, it is very convenient. The core advantage of the folding design is portability. When folded, the volume can be reduced by nearly half, making it easy to fit into a backpack or picnic basket. Can the three-layer protective net prevent children from accidentally touching and getting electrocuted? Yes, this is the core safety function of the three-layer power grid.
